title: import_family_aware_permutation_design_v1 — manifest contract for the family-aware permutation design TSV
description: Validates POST /api/actions when type='import_family_aware_permutation_design'. Reads a per-(focal_inversion × parent) permutation-design TSV and emits a staging_family_aware_permutation_design_v0 layer. Per SPEC_family_aware_permutation_design_adapter.md §3, the canonical column set is focal_inversion_id, parent_id, family_id, karyotype, permutation_block, and the optionals hub_id, n_offspring.

path.description: Workspace-relative path to the family_aware_permutation_design TSV.

max_rows.description: Optional cap for very large fixtures.
